calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alisa Kim, Esq. 415-826-9160 for Plaintiff Cach LLC.
No other appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Cindy Rangel.

Granted in part. The levying officer is to take $25 dollars per week from Ms. Rangel. The money held by the Sheriff is to be disbursed to the Judgment Creditor.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
